text:
SCTNG_DSCHRG_CD Therapies: Suctioning (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving suctioning therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
583 SCTNG_SCHLD_ADMSN_CD SCTNG_SCHLD_ADMSN_CD Therapies: Suctioning - Scheduled (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving scheduled suctioning therapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
584 SCTNG_SCHLD_DSCHRG_CD
